Thanks for contributing! Please read CONTRIBUTING.md first.
Edit the source under src/ / manifests/ - never dist/ (it's generated).
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

Closes #<!-- issue number, if any -->

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐞 Bug fix
- [ ] 💡 New feature / option
- [ ] 🧹 Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] 📝 Docs
- [ ] 🔧 Build / CI

## Screenshots

<!-- REQUIRED for any UI or feed-detection change. Before/after if possible. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Edited `src/` / `manifests/`, not `dist/`.
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds for all targets.
- [ ] `npx web-ext lint --source-dir dist/firefox` is clean (0/0/0).
- [ ] Manually tested the affected behavior (note which TEST-PLAN.md sections).
- [ ] No new permissions, dependencies, or remote code (or justified below).
- [ ] Used `browser.*` (not `chrome.*`) in feature code.
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior/settings changed.
